title: Newton-Raphson (NR) Method Optimization Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of the Newton-Raphson method for finding a local minimum in convex optimization.
elements: Solve H(xₖ)p = -∇f(xₖ) for search direction p
relationships: Sequential flow from Start through computation steps
Loop from 'Check Convergence' back to gradient computation if not converged
